requirement_topic.en: Iraq Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz, Grid Instability, and MoEL Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: 伊拉克并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz、电网不稳定性及电力部协调
requirement_topic.zht: 伊拉克併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz、電網不穩定性及電力部協調

summary.en: Iraq operates on a 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz grid regulated by the Ministry of Electricity (MoEL). Iraq's grid is characterised by chronic instability, frequent outages, and voltage fluctuations; hybrid backup power systems (diesel generators or UPS) are common and often essential for continuous EV charger operation. Any grid-connected EV charging installation must be coordinated with MoEL and local distribution authorities. EV infrastructure is very nascent in Iraq; no standardised national grid-connection programme for EV chargers had been confirmed from official published sources as of 2026-06-14. Exporters must confirm MoEL coordination requirements, metering, load management, and project approval processes with Iraqi authorities and local engineering partners before deployment.
summary.zh: 伊拉克电网为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，由电力部（MoEL）监管。伊拉克电网以长期不稳定、频繁停电和电压波动为特征；混合备用电源系统（柴油发电机或UPS）普遍存在，且通常是保障EV充电桩持续运行的必要条件。任何并网电动汽车充电安装须与MoEL及当地配电主管部门协调。伊拉克电动汽车基础设施仍处于非常初期阶段；截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方已发布来源确认针对EV充电桩的标准化全国并网计划。出口商在部署前须与伊拉克当局及当地工程合作方确认MoEL协调要求、计量、负载管理和项目审批流程。
summary.zht: 伊拉克電網為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，由電力部（MoEL）監管。伊拉克電網以長期不穩定、頻繁停電和電壓波動為特徵；混合備用電源系統（柴油發電機或UPS）普遍存在，且通常是保障EV充電樁持續運行的必要條件。任何併網電動汽車充電安裝須與MoEL及當地配電主管部門協調。伊拉克電動汽車基礎設施仍處於非常初期階段；截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方已發布來源確認針對EV充電樁的標準化全國併網計劃。出口商在部署前須與伊拉克當局及當地工程合作方確認MoEL協調要求、計量、負載管理和項目審批流程。

standards_or_laws: Iraq Ministry of Electricity (MoEL) — grid connection and project coordination requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (wide input-voltage range requirements)
Local distribution authority project approval requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are accepted under GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Iraq's 230/400 V supply is nominally close to China's grid voltage but requires confirmation of input-voltage tolerance across a wide range given Iraq's chronic grid instability; thermal derating, surge protection, and backup-power compatibility must also be confirmed for Iraq deployment conditions.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。伊拉克230/400 V供电名义上与中国电网电压接近，但由于伊拉克电网长期不稳定，须确认充电桩在宽范围输入电压下的容差；热降额、浪涌保护及备用电源兼容性亦须针对伊拉克部署条件加以确认。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。伊拉克230/400 V供電名義上與中國電網電壓接近，但由於伊拉克電網長期不穩定，須確認充電樁在寬範圍輸入電壓下的容差；熱降額、浪涌保護及備用電源兼容性亦須針對伊拉克部署條件加以確認。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) input-voltage range covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz with wide tolerance for Iraq grid fluctuations; (2) power electronics include sufficient surge protection and voltage ride-through for Iraq's unstable grid; (3) the charger design supports or is compatible with hybrid backup power (generator or UPS) for continuity during outages; (4) thermal design is suitable for Iraq's extreme ambient temperatures (up to 50 °C in summer); (5) MoEL and local distribution authority project coordination is completed before installation. China domestic 220 V / 380 V design without wide-range voltage tolerance and surge protection is not grid-ready for Iraq conditions.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 输入电压范围覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，并具备足够宽容差以应对伊拉克电网波动；(2) 电力电子设备具备充分的浪涌保护和电压穿越能力，适应伊拉克不稳定电网；(3) 充电桩设计支持或兼容混合备用电源（发电机或UPS），保障停电期间持续供电；(4) 热设计适合伊拉克极端环境温度（夏季最高达50°C）；(5) 安装前完成MoEL及当地配电主管部门的项目协调。未经宽范围电压容差和浪涌保护确认的中国国内220 V / 380 V设计不满足伊拉克电网部署条件。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 輸入電壓範圍覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，並具備足夠寬容差以應對伊拉克電網波動；(2) 電力電子設備具備充分的浪涌保護和電壓穿越能力，適應伊拉克不穩定電網；(3) 充電樁設計支持或兼容混合備用電源（發電機或UPS），保障停電期間持續供電；(4) 熱設計適合伊拉克極端環境溫度（夏季最高達50°C）；(5) 安裝前完成MoEL及當地配電主管部門的項目協調。未經寬範圍電壓容差和浪涌保護確認的中國國內220 V / 380 V設計不滿足伊拉克電網部署條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — MoEL and local distribution authority coordination required for grid-connected installations; specific national EV charger grid-connection standards should be confirmed with MoEL before deployment
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a MoEL approval substitute; voltage tolerance, surge protection, and thermal ratings must be re-confirmed for Iraq conditions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An Iraq-ready charger package needs wide-input-voltage tolerance, surge and backup-power compatibility, thermal derating for extreme heat, and MoEL project coordination. China domestic 220 V / 380 V design without grid-instability provisions is not Iraq deployment-ready.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向伊拉克的充电桩须具备宽范围输入电压容差、浪涌及备用电源兼容性、极端高温热降额，以及MoEL项目协调。未具备电网不稳定应对措施的中国国内220 V / 380 V设计不满足伊拉克部署要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向伊拉克的充電樁須具備寬範圍輸入電壓容差、浪涌及備用電源兼容性、極端高溫熱降額，以及MoEL項目協調。未具備電網不穩定應對措施的中國國內220 V / 380 V設計不滿足伊拉克部署要求。
